channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Incumbent Borno Senators Reaffirmed Unopposed in APC Primaries
item.description: The three sitting senators from Borno State, namely Ali Ndume (Borno South), Mohammed Monguno (Borno North), and Kala Shehu Lawan, SAN, (Borno Central) have all returned unopposed in the APC primaries...

item.title: Cruise Ship Arrives in Rotterdam After Hantavirus Outbreak, Crew Quarantined
item.description: A cruise ship operated by Dutch company Oceanwide Expeditions concluded its voyage in Rotterdam on Monday after a hantavirus outbreak sparked international concern. The vessel, which began its journey...

item.title: Daily Superquiz and Mini Crossword for 19 May 2026
item.description: The Age offers its readers a daily Superquiz along with a Mini Crossword designed for those who enjoy bite-sized puzzle challenges. The Mini Crossword features ten clues across twenty-five squares, pr...

item.title: Delhi High Court refuses to allow Vinesh Phogat in Asian Games trials; WFI policies upheld
item.description: On May 18, 2026, the Delhi High Court denied wrestler Vinesh Phogat’s request for interim relief to participate in the 2026 Asian Games selection trials scheduled on May 30 and 31. Justice Purushaindr...

item.title: Key Bafana Bafana players under consideration for World Cup 2026
item.description: With the 2026 World Cup fast approaching, Bafana Bafana coach Hugo Broos is expected to announce his squad at the Union Buildings in Pretoria on May 27. Several players have been highlighted as strong...

item.title: Behind the Scenes with Joan Collins on the Set of Seven Thieves (1960)
item.description: Released in 1960, 'Seven Thieves' is a classic heist noir film directed by Henry Hathaway, showcasing Edward G. Robinson as an aging criminal mastermind who organizes a team to pull off an ambitious r...

item.title: IHC issues notices to CDA on One Constitution Avenue apartment owners’ appeals
item.description: ISLAMABAD: The Islamabad High Court (IHC) on Monday summoned the Capital Development Authority (CDA) for a response on appeals filed by 20 sub-lessees of the One Constitution Avenue apartments. These ...

item.title: Troost-Ekong to Lead Ceremonial Draw for AFCON 2027 Qualifiers in Cairo
item.description: Former Super Eagles captain William Troost-Ekong go play big role for the AFCON 2027 qualification draw wey go happen for Cairo, Egypt on Tuesday, May 19. The draw dey organized by the Egyptian Footba...

item.title: Trump Targets Thomas Massie in Kentucky Primary Over Spending, War, and Epstein Files
item.description: President Donald Trump has intensified his campaign against Republican Representative Thomas Massie, urging his followers to vote Massie out in the Kentucky primary. Massie, despite a history of conse...

item.title: Veteran Financial Post Editor Neville Nankivell Passes Away at 91
item.description: Neville Nankivell, a prominent figure in Canadian business journalism, passed away at his Ottawa home on May 3 at the age of 91 after a battle with cancer. Born on December 8, 1934, in Cottesloe, West...

item.title: Senate Begins Impeachment Trial of Vice President Sara Duterte; Updates on Other Key National and International News
item.description: On May 18, 2026, the Philippine Senate convened as an impeachment court to begin the trial of Vice President Sara Duterte. This follows the official impeachment proceedings filed against her, marking ...

item.title: Stella Reflects on Joy’s Memory After a Child’s Reminder | The Alibi Episode 44
item.description: In Episode 44 of 'The Alibi,' viewers saw a touching moment between Stella Morales and a young child who reminded her of Joy, a character whose presence has had a lasting impact on Stella. The episode...

item.title: Nationwide Transport Disruption as PSV Operators Strike Over Fuel Prices
item.description: On Monday, commuters across Kenya were severely affected as a nationwide strike by public service vehicle (PSV) operators brought major towns and highways to a standstill. Operators from major matatu ...

item.title: Malala Highlights Role of Educated Youth in Pakistan's Progress
item.description: LONDON: Nobel Peace Prize winner Malala Yousufzai expressed her optimism about Pakistan’s future, emphasising the role of the country's educated and passionate youth in driving progress. Speaking to G...

item.title: Kaduna Governor Approves Suleiman Sa’ad Abubakar as New Emir of Kagarko
item.description: Kaduna State Governor, Uba Sani, don approve Alhaji Suleiman Sa’ad Abubakar to become the new Emir of Kagarko. According to statement from the Commissioner for Local Government, Alhaji Sadiq Mamman-La...

item.title: Tanzanian Youth Encouraged to Access Government Financial Support for Businesses
item.description: The Tanzanian government has urged the country's youth to actively use government-backed loans designed to support small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs). Officials highlighted that over 72 percent...

item.title: Andy Burnham Addresses By-Election Concerns and Economic Policies Amid EU Rejoin Debate
item.description: Andy Burnham, Mayor of Greater Manchester, has attempted to manage a political storm as he campaigns in the Eurosceptic constituency of Makerfield ahead of a by-election scheduled for 18 June 2026. Wh...

item.title: India unveils first bullet train for Mumbai-Ahmedabad high-speed corridor
item.description: India has revealed the first look of its inaugural bullet train, which will run on the Mumbai-Ahmedabad high-speed rail corridor. The display was showcased at Gate Number 4 of the Ministry of Railways...

item.title: Cyberabad Police Expands Charges Against Sai Bhageerath in Minor Sexual Assault Case
item.description: The Cyberabad police have updated the first information report (FIR) in the case against Bandi Sai Bhageerath, son of a Union Minister of State for Home Affairs, regarding the alleged sexual assault o...

item.title: Former GOP Strategist Highlights Republican Party's Ongoing Struggle with Trump Loyalty
item.description: Rick Wilson, co-founder of The Lincoln Project and former Republican strategist, highlights a fundamental flaw within the GOP: the party’s inability to reconcile principle with loyalty to Donald Trump...
